_comment: Railway template configuration as code for hermes-station.
AUTHORITATIVE SCHEMA. Field names below match Railway's serializedConfig
as returned by the public GraphQL endpoint:
REPUBLISH WORKFLOW: open the template in Railway's dashboard, paste this
JSON into the Project Config import field, save, then publish a new version.
Service IDs are stable across edits — preserve the existing UUIDs.

HERMES_WEBUI_PASSWORD.description: Password for the WebUI chat login. Pick a strong value; rotate by updating this variable and redeploying.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Optional: your OpenRouter API key. When set, configure as the provider in the webui Settings after first deploy.

HERMES_GATEWAY_ENABLED.description: Set to '1' to start the hermes-agent gateway for messaging platform bots (Discord, Telegram, Slack, etc.). Leave unset for web-only use.
